tools.name: get_accelerator_costs
tools.description: Returns 13 specific AI accelerators (H100/H200/B100/B200/GB200, MI300X/MI355X, Gaudi 3, TPU v5p, Trainium 2, Maia 100, MTIA v2) with structured fields: chip, vendor, processNode, dieSizeMm2, memoryType, memoryCapacityGb, memoryBandwidthTbS, fp8TflopsSparse, bf16TflopsDense, packageType, estMfgCostUs

tools.name: calculate_chip_cost
tools.description: Pure-function chip cost estimator. Given die dimensions (mm), process node, and optional packaging/HBM parameters, returns: estimatedChipCost (USD), dieArea (mm²), grossDiesPerWafer, frontendYield (%), totalYield (%), and a costBreakdown {waferCostPerGoodDie, packagingAndTestCost, hbmCost, marginCos

tools.name: estimate_lead_time
tools.description: Heuristic chip manufacturing LEAD TIME estimator (MANUFACTURING CYCLE TIME). Given total mask layers (or a processNode to default them), foundry utilization % (optional — defaults from live foundry-allocation data), and packagingType, returns min/max bands: fabDays, fabWeeks, packagingWeeks, totalWe

tools.name: get_hbm_market_data
tools.description:
Returns 10 HBM market sub-tables: accelerators, specs, marketShare, spotPrices, leadingIndicators, qualificationFeed, revenueForecast, supplierRevenue, validationChecks, bitDemand. Optional `table` parameter narrows to a single sub-table; omitting returns all 10.

USE THIS for: HBM3/3e/4 generation

tools.name: get_market_pulse
tools.description:
Returns curated supply-chain headlines with trend direction (up/down/neutral), source attribution, and impact analysis. Categories: logic, memory, packaging, connectivity, power, geopolitics. Defaults to all categories, all trends, no limit.

USE THIS for: "what's happening in HBM this quarter?", "a

tools.name: get_wafer_pricing
tools.description:
Returns 300mm wafer price ranges (min/avg/max USD), defect density, NRE/mask-set cost, and node maturity for: tsmc-n3, tsmc-n5, tsmc-n7, tsmc-28, samsung-3nm, samsung-5nm, intel-16. Optional `node` filter narrows to one.

USE THIS for: looking up wafer cost for cost modeling, comparing foundries at

tools.name: get_packaging_costs
tools.description:
Returns two sub-arrays: `packaging` (per-tech cost benchmark + capability matrix for CoWoS-S/L, EMIB, SoIC, InFO-PoP, FC-BGA, FC-CSP, etc.) and `hbmSpecs` (HBM2 through HBM4 cost per stack + bandwidth/capacity). Optional `type` filter narrows packaging array to one technology.

USE THIS for: packagi

tools.name: get_hbm_qualification
tools.description: Sourced HBM qualification tracker: which memory vendor (SK Hynix, Samsung, Micron) passed which AI-accelerator customer's qualification (NVIDIA Vera Rubin/GB300/B300/H200, AMD MI350/MI325X, Broadcom), by generation (HBM3/HBM3E/HBM4) and stack height. Returns `matrix` (current status per vendor×custo

tools.name: get_foundry_allocation
tools.description: Foundry & advanced-packaging ALLOCATION — the current-state snapshot per node/tech (TSMC/Samsung/Intel/... × N2/N3/CoWoS-L/SoIC/...) plus optional time-series HISTORY. Current fields: allocation_status (fully_booked → available), lead_time_weeks_min/max + trend, utilization, price_trend, geo_risk, c

tools.name: get_foundry_economics
tools.description: Foundry IR ECONOMICS — per-foundry, per-process-node, per-fiscal-quarter wafer ASP (min/max/blended, USD per 300mm-equivalent wafer, $250-grained) and fab UTILIZATION (%), derived exclusively from PUBLIC IR materials (earnings releases/transcripts/decks, trade press) via a documented scaling calcula

tools.name: get_recent_changes
tools.description: "What Changed" — recent MOVEMENTS in Silicon Analysts' public data over a 7d/30d window, derived from the daily snapshot ledger. Each moved metric returns direction (up/down), magnitude (pct_delta for value metrics, pp_delta for percentage metrics), old/new values, the two snapshot dates compared (a

tools.name: get_market_intelligence
tools.description: Market Intelligence — the freshest SOURCED semiconductor market briefs, generated daily from a Tavily + Claude scan of primary press, earnings, and trade outlets. Each brief returns title, severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), confidence_score (0-100), quantitative_impact (e.g. "Est. BOM increase: +$

tools.name: get_market_advantage
tools.description: Market Advantage — human-vetted TIME-ADVANTAGE evidence: dated, immutable proof that Silicon Analysts recorded a semiconductor supply-chain event BEFORE the first English-language coverage of it. For each win: our first-seen timestamp (immutable), the cited source's own publication time, the first E

tools.name: get_benchmark_history
tools.description: Historical Benchmarks — the bitemporal benchmark-observations ledger behind the Chip Cost Calculator: wafer cost by node/foundry (deflationary curves), defect-density (D0) learning curves per node, advanced-packaging costs incl. the broken-out CoWoS interposer entity, test cost, backend yield, and H

tools.name: get_fab_capacity
tools.description: Fab Capacity — per-fab, per-tech-node-class capacity from the fabs + fab_capacity_snapshots time-series (65 fabs: TSMC, Samsung, Intel, SMIC, GlobalFoundries, and more; Frontend in kwspm, Backend advanced-packaging in k units/month). Default mode returns the LATEST state per (fab, node class) at/bef

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_hbm_qualification, get_foundry_allocation, get_foundry_economics, get_market_intelligence, get_market_advantage · Private data: get_accelerator_costs, get_wafer_pricing, get_hbm_qualification, get_foundry_allocation, get_foundry_economics, get_recent_changes, get_market_intelligence, get_benchmark_history · Public sink: calculate_chip_cost, get_hbm_market_data, get_hbm_qualification, get_foundry_allocation, get_foundry_economics, get_fab_capacity.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_hbm_qualification, get_foundry_allocation, get_foundry_economics, get_market_intelligence, get_market_advantage · Private data: get_accelerator_costs, get_wafer_pricing, get_hbm_qualification, get_foundry_allocation, get_foundry_economics, get_recent_changes, get_market_intelligence, get_benchmark_history · Public sink: calculate_chip_cost, get_hbm_market_data, get_hbm_qualification, get_foundry_allocation, get_foundry_economics, get_fab_capacity

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

name: get_policy_events
description: Trade-Policy Timeline — the dated log of semiconductor trade-policy actions (export controls, entity listings, license policies, tariffs, subsidies, retaliation) anchored to GOVERNMENT PRIMARY documents (Federal Register / BIS, USTR, MOFCOM, METI, EU, Netherlands…), back to the Oct 2022 BIS advanced
